creator: nick@foobar.org
text:
updated patch to cope with repocopy.

Nick
--
diff -bNur drupal5-gsitemap.orig/Makefile drupal5-gsitemap/Makefile
--- drupal5-gsitemap.orig/Makefile	Sun Mar 25 10:46:44 2007
+++ drupal5-gsitemap/Makefile	Tue Apr  3 22:22:40 2007
@@ -1,21 +1,20 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	drupal-gsitemap
-# Date created:				27 Jan 2007
+# New ports collection makefile for:	drupal5-gsitemap
+# Date created:				26 Mar 2007
 # Whom:					Nick Hilliard <nick@foobar.org>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/www/drupal5-gsitemap/Makefile,v 1.2 2007/03/25 09:46:44 rafan Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gsitemap
-DISTVERSION=	4.7.x-1.0
-PORTREVISION=	20070111
+DISTVERSION=	5.x-1.2
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.osuosl.org/pub/drupal/files/projects/
 
 MAINTAINER=	nick@foobar.org
 COMMENT=	Produces Google/sitemaps.org compliant XML WWW site maps
 
-DRUPAL_MODULE=	yes
-MODULE_FILES=	gsitemap.install gsitemap.module
+DRUPAL5_MODULE=	yes
+MODULE_FILES=	gsitemap.info gsitemap.install gsitemap.module gss.xsl
 DOC_FILES=	INSTALL.txt LICENSE.txt README.txt
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
diff -bNur drupal5-gsitemap.orig/distinfo drupal5-gsitemap/distinfo
--- drupal5-gsitemap.orig/distinfo	Sun Jan 28 00:24:59 2007
+++ drupal5-gsitemap/distinfo	Tue Apr  3 22:22:40 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (drupal/gsitemap-4.7.x-1.0.tar.gz) = bdc420297021961c17905d25fa24f82f
-SHA256 (drupal/gsitemap-4.7.x-1.0.tar.gz) = 536b92f21c784f9ea3e25163a76f5cc4ea34d162b62a5c3afe0ebd9b87b04f19
-SIZE (drupal/gsitemap-4.7.x-1.0.tar.gz) = 11241
+MD5 (drupal/gsitemap-5.x-1.2.tar.gz) = e4f4c08f889f57b7a7c6887b2200825c
+SHA256 (drupal/gsitemap-5.x-1.2.tar.gz) = 620f9c32fc522c568feb45559c4b580c8b3d09e54792ee9a13e4223ffb70e421
+SIZE (drupal/gsitemap-5.x-1.2.tar.gz) = 19514
